name: Randotura
short_description: Randotura is a top-down action roguelike with inventory management. Dive into bullet hell action and collect unique modifiers, all in a selfmade dungeon.
detailed_description:
Randotura is a top-down action roguelike with inventory management.

Level Creation: In Randotura, the power of level design is in your hands. Place shop, combat and bonus rooms to strategically shape your adventure. Every decision you make influences the game’s difficulty and flow.

Intense Combat: Dodge enemy projectiles and weave between their attacks. Randotura has a variety of enemies with distinct behaviour to challenge your bullet hell skills.

Unique Upgrades: All upgrades in Randotura have a significant impact—no boring stat changes! But beweary since cost of an item is its place on the map. Combine these upgrades to tailor your playstyle, creating devastating combos.
